title: Evidence bundle generation and review gate
description: Two-stage evidence review: (1) generate bundles at docs/evidence/ with CI check runs, file diffs, changed files, verdict.json. (2) LLM review of bundles returns PASS/FAIL for merge gate condition 6. Ref: jleechanclaw evidence_bundle.py + evidence_review_gate.py

title: test bead
Pattern synthesizer: generate high-confidence fix strategy templates from outcomes
description: Read outcomes.jsonl, synthesize patterns.json with winning strategies per error class. Run on configurable interval (default 4h). parallel-retry reads patterns to bias strategy selection. Ref: jleechanclaw pattern_synthesizer.py

title: PR poller plugin: implement PR-scanning logic that spawns sessions for non-green PRs (respawn cap 10/12h)
description: poller-manager.ts framework exists but no plugin scans open PRs. Need a poller plugin that: queries GitHub for open PRs, checks CI/review state, spawns sessions for non-green PRs with no active worktree, enforces respawn cap (max 10 per PR per 12h). Ref: jleechanclaw ao-pr-poller.sh

title: Webhook ingress: HTTP server with HMAC validation and SQLite dedup
description: GitHub App webhook receiver with X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC validation, SQLite event dedup by X-GitHub-Delivery header, normalized event queue for downstream processing. Replaces need for external webhook relay. Ref: jleechanclaw webhook_ingress.py + webhook_daemon.py + webhook_queue.py

title: Session reaper: nightly cleanup of orphaned/stale tmux sessions
description: Scheduled job (daily 3am): poll tmux for agent sessions, query GitHub for branch PR state, kill sessions that are orphaned >2h or have no PR >4h. Max 5 kills per run. Ref: jleechanclaw ao-session-reaper.sh + session_reaper.py

title: FailureBudgetTracker runtime: track retry attempts and route to escalation actions
description: ReactionConfig has failureBudget/onBudgetExhausted types (bd-uxs.3) but lifecycle-manager does not track budgets at runtime. Implement FailureBudgetTracker alongside existing reactionTrackers: count attempts per session, detect budget exhaustion, route to kill-and-respawn/notify/parallel-retry. Ref: jleechanclaw escalation_router.py

title: Outcome recorder: persist winning/losing fix strategies per error class
description: Config schema for learning exists (bd-uxs.5) but no runtime code. Implement: on parallel-retry completion, append outcome to outcomes.jsonl (session ID, error class, strategy, success/fail). Query by error class to find historical win rates. Ref: jleechanclaw outcome_recorder.py

title: Merge-gate enforcement: implement 6-condition checker behind merge-gate reaction
description: merge-gate reaction type exists in config schema (bd-uxs.8) but no enforcement logic. Implement the 6 checks: CI green, mergeable, CodeRabbit approved, Bugbot clean, inline comments resolved, evidence review pass. Gate blocks auto-merge until all pass. Ref: jleechanclaw merge_gate.py

title: EPIC: Implement jleechanclaw orchestration runtime logic in AO
MCP agent mail integration for inter-agent guidance messaging
description: Bidirectional messaging between orchestrator and agent sessions via MCP agent mail. Send guidance (fix strategy, context) to running agents. Receive completion/status updates. Ref: jleechanclaw mcp_mail.py + dispatch_task.py

title: Slack notification plugin with outbox queue and dead letter handling
description: Notification plugin for Slack: task start/completion DMs, thread replies, outbox queue (JSONL, atomic writes), dead letter queue for failed sends, 30s timeout with fallback. Ref: jleechanclaw openclaw_notifier.py

title: Parallel retry: add CI monitoring, winner detection, and loser cleanup
description: case parallel-retry spawns N sessions (bd-uxs.4) but nobody monitors which succeeds. Need: poll CI status across spawned sessions, detect first-green-wins, kill losing sessions, promote winner branch. Ref: jleechanclaw parallel_retry.py

title: EPIC: Absorb jleechanclaw orchestration patterns into AO core
Fix workspace dirty bug: AO self-dirties worktrees on ~/.openclaw layout
PR poller plugin: scan open PRs, spawn sessions (outer initiation loop AO is missing)
Escalation router: policy-driven failure budgets + deterministic routing in lifecycle-manager
Parallel retry action: speculative parallel CI fix sessions, first-green-wins
Outcome recorder + pattern synthesizer: closed-loop learning from CI fix outcomes
Session exit reconciliation: detect exits, validate commits pushed, emit proof payload
Auto-resolve stale PR review threads after fix push
description: When a fix commit is pushed, auto-resolve GitHub review threads whose file location was modified. Uses GraphQL to query unresolved threads, filters bot-only threads. Helps unblock PRs stuck in UNSTABLE merge state. Ref: jleechanclaw auto_resolve_threads.py
